occupation: Senior Vice President Marketing at Vistar Media
headline: Marketing & strategy for unique technology
summary:
As SVP of Marketing at Vistar Media, I help define our global strategy—what we build, how we bring it to market, and how we support our customers. I’m focused on making programmatic out-of-home more accessible and inspiring brands to see its potential.

With a background in ad tech, I love connecting innovative products with real market needs...in this case, driving growth for OOH as a dynamic and impactful channel. It’s about sparking enthusiasm and creating the right conditions for brands to thrive in the real world.

I'm passionate about supporting people in their marketing careers, and continuing to develop my own marketing skills and experiences! I am extremely fortunate to work with an incredible team of marketers at Vistar, along with a uniquely sharp and kind group of colleagues at the company at large.
location_str: New York, New York, United States

experiences.title: Director of Marketing
experiences.description: Vistar Media is a programmatic technology company for digital out-of-home. Using advanced movement data analysis, we provide targeting, seamless activation and measurement of audience-based buying across out-of-home and mobile media. Our end-to-end programmatic ecosystem provides unrivaled scale, built for the complexities of OOH media.

experiences.title: Senior Account Executive
experiences.description: Awards: Silver Bell for Raytheon MathMovesU Pi Day Celebration in the Community/Consumer Affairs Campaigns category (Publicity Club of New England); Silver Bell for Raytheon Professional Services Corporate Blog (Publicity Club of New England); Honorable Mention, Best Issue/Cause Advocacy Campaign for Raytheon MATHCOUNTS National Competition (PR Daily).

education.field_of_study: English and American Language and Literature
education.description: Graduated cum laude, with High Honors in English

volunteer_work.title: Advisory Board Member
volunteer_work.description: WE.DOOH is a DPAA powered Initiative in partnership with Advance Women at Work, that unites the women working across the Digital Out-of-Home ecosystem. We harness and celebrate the talents and skills of women working in our industry, encourage and push for more representation at the podium, on panels, at events, and strive to engage younger generations of women to get interested and involved with DOOH!
